appRepositories.appDescription:
MakePass is a powerful Apple Wallet pass editor: you can start from an empty pass, open a previously saved pass file or import any supported barcode from images, PDFs or directly from the camera. With MakePass AI you can even take a photo of a card or ticket and MakePass will design the Apple Wallet pass for you including relevant text and info extracted from them. Then, you can customize the pass and save, share or store it directly on Apple Wallet. MakePass also supports creating passes with Shortcuts!

MakePass supports customizing passes in a lot of ways:
- Import or manually define the pass barcode type and content with any format supported by Apple Wallet: QR, AZTEC, PDF417 and Code 128 with text payloads. MakePass also allows you to convert unsupported barcodes to any of the valid formats or embed them in the original format as a pass image.
- Add a title, organization, description and custom fields that will be visible on the header, front and back of the pass.
- Define the pass group to select which passes of the same type appear grouped on Apple Wallet. MakePass supports up to 10 different pass groups.
- Add custom images for the icon, logo, background, strip image or lateral thumbnail.
- Set custom colors for the background, titles and body text. MakePass can also automatically infer the color scheme of the pass when you import a barcode or use MakePass AI.
- Choose the type of pass: Event Ticket, Boarding Pass, Generic, Store Card or Coupon.
- For boarding passes set the transit type: Air, Boat, Bus, Train or Generic.
- Set a relevant date, expiration date and up to 10 relevant locations, so the pass automatically appears on the lock screen when it becomes relevant.
- Add an associated app that will appear on the pass on the Wallet app so you can quickly install or launch it.

MakePass also includes advanced features like keyboard shortcuts, Quick Actions, Handoff and full support for automating the creation and customization of passes with Shortcuts!

Mod Feature:
- Paid app for free

Keep track of your savings goal in a personalised 3D money jar and feel rewarded for every dollar you put away!

Loot helps you calculate how long it will take you to save for your goal based on the amount you want put away. A savings plan is created for you and you’ll receive push notifications to keep you on track.

Main Features:
- Save by week, fortnight or month.
- Auto calculate based on the amount needed to save or by time.
- View previews and upcoming payments toward your savings goal.
- Add or remove payments.
- Personalise your savings jar with 60 unique label styles.
- Push notification reminders by week, fortnight or month at a specific time.
- Dark mode ready.

With Denim, create gorgeous cover art that takes your playlist to the next level.

Creating a playlist cover is as easy as:
- Selecting a playlist
- Previewing different artworks
- Saving & adding it to your playlist

With Denim Pro you can unlock all 70+ artworks, access upcoming features & artworks and even alternate app icons. Purchase Denim Pro once and enjoy for lifetime. No subscription business!

FotMob gives you all the live scores, stats, and storylines to keep you up to speed with the world of soccer. Personalized news and notifications make it easy to follow your favorite teams and players. And lightning-quick match updates make sure you never miss a goal, no matter where you are.

Features include:
- Live match scores
- Home screen widgets with support for iOS 16 features. Includes news and live match updates. 
- Detailed stats, including xG and shot maps
- Video highlights
- Live text commentary
- News feeds
- Transfer center
- Alerts for your favorite clubs and players
- TV schedules
- Audio commentary

Coverage for over 375 competitions including: World Cup 2022, Premier League, La Liga, Serie A, Bundesliga, Ligue 1, MLS, USL, Champions League, Liga MX, Euros, FA Women’s Super League, Eredivisie, FA Cup, UEFA Nations League, the Championship, EFL, Scottish Premier League, and more.
Follow for the latest updates and to share feedback - we'd love to hear from you!

The names and logos of teams in this application are used solely for the identification of the respective teams and leagues. Neither the EPL nor any EPL club has endorsed or is associated with this application.

ToBuy is the ultimate shopping list application designed to simplify your grocery shopping experience. With its user-friendly interface and intuitive design, ToBuy allows you to quickly and easily create shopping lists for all your needs, from groceries to household items.

App features:
- With ToBuy, you can create multiple shopping lists for different occasions, such as weekly grocery shopping, party supplies, or holiday gifts
- You can easily add or remove items, and categorize them by department to make your shopping trip more efficient
- Share your lists with friends or family members to coordinate your shopping trips

Whether you're a busy mom, a college student, or just someone who loves to shop, ToBuy is the perfect app for anyone who wants to make their shopping experience more efficient, organized, and enjoyable.

Download ToBuy today and start making your shopping trips more enjoyable and stress-free!

PIN-Wallet allows you to store information about your bank cards. All data is stored only on the phone. The application cannot be synchronized with cloud services.

Features:
- Data is stored in encrypted form
- Login to the application by Touch and Face ID
- Ability to quickly share the card number via SMS, email or any other method
- Convenient and simple interface
- Without advertising
- Choice of card design
- Access to the application without an internet connection

Wallpapers Central is a service provided by iSpazio and it's completely dedicated to the graphic customization of your devices. This means: Wallpapers, LIVE Wallpapers, Depth Effect Wallpapers and much more!

It's very easy to use thanks to the 5 navigation tabs at the bottom:

- HOME: From this selection you will be able to download the "Wallpaper of the Day", which will arrive promptly every 24 hours with a custom Push Notification sound. You will also be able to download all the other Wallpapers on the site. All this is completely free and without limits!

- FEED: A really powerful and very interesting section that allows you to download new wallpapers uploaded directly by other app's users (from all over the world!). Yes, with this application we give you the opportunity to upload your original wallpapers, your perfect photos or artworks. We will manually review and moderate all the wallpapers and we will approve only the highest quality ones, according to our Terms of Use.

- LIVE WALLS: This section offers access to our gallery of LIVE Wallpapers that come alive on the Lockscreen when we long click on the screen. This content is reserved for PRO users. You can use in-app purchases to subscribe a PRO account.

- DEPTH EFFECT: A separate section with stunning Depth Effect Wallpapers, created for iOS 16 and above. These special Wallpapers can overleap the clock on the lockscreen, creating a beautiful 3D effect.

- SETTINGS: Useful for adjusting the app's appearance by forcing Dark Mode or Light Mode. From this section you can also clear the cache, delete favorites, manage notifications, follow us on social networks, quick access to our Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.

There is also a search engine to quickly find the wallpapers that best suit your tastes of the moment.

Wallpapers Central is a service of iSpazio. Wallpapers Central is not affiliated with Apple. Logos, names and screenshots may show components that Apple owns brands.

This app contains ads that can be removed with an IAP.

Sort your apps A-Z or by color on iOS 14.0 - 16.1.2!

Main Features:
- Works on any iPhone running iOS 14.0 - 16.1.2
- Sort apps A-Z, Z-A, or by color
- Supports sorting for all types of icons, even ones themed with TrollTools
- Choose only the pages you want to sort
- Sort pages independently or all together
- Sort folders separately or mixed in with apps
- Ability to back up a home screen layout, and quickly undo an accidental sort

A Jailed toolbox application for iOS 14.0-15.7.1 and 16.0-16.1.2

Springboard:
- Hide dock
- Hide home bar
- Hide folder backgrounds
- Disable library pod background
- Disable folder background blur
- Disable app switcher blur
- Hide CC Module Backgrounds
- Hide Notification Banner Background
- Notification Banner Shadow

App Icon Themes:
- Importing folders of app icons
- No WebClips!

Audio:
- Custom sound effects
- Upload your own sounds (nearly every audio format allowed!)
- Max upload audio size of 150 kb, but will not apply for audio if too big!

Passcode:
- Customize passcode keys
- Import passcode keys files (.passthm) from TrollTools

Locks:
- Importing locks from TrollLock
- Custom number of frames + custom animation speeds (see below)

Status Bar
- Change carrier name
- Change secondary carrier name
- Change battery display detail
- Change time text
- Change breadcrumb text
- Show numeric WiFi/Cellular strength
- Hide many icons in the status bar

Other Tools:
- Custom Fonts
- Lock Screen Footnote
- Notification Badges Changer (iOS 14-15 ONLY)
- Springboard Colors
- Settings App Customizer
- Calculator Error Message

Misc:
- Disable shortcut banners
- Turn shortcuts into app clips
- Supervise Device Warning: Use the features below at your own risk!
- Enable iPhone X Gestures
- Enable Dynamic Island (iOS 16+)

Extra Tools:
- Lock Screen Footnote
- No Lock On Respring
- Disable Low Power Alert

Warning: Some changes are permanent on iOS 14.0-14.8.1

FitShare is integrated with Apple Health and Apple Watch workouts - it allows you to create beautiful sharing content for social media based on your workouts.

Main Features:
- Highly customizable
- Support a variety of sharing forms
- Built-in multiple useful gadgets
- High-quality content output
